name: Miles Sowden
title: Insurance Executive, Growth and Transformation
credentials: Graduate, Australian Institute of Company Directors (GAICD)

skills.evidence: GAICD graduate. Reported to boards and committees at CBA, Hollard and SCI on the full range of executive topics including strategy, risk, performance and conduct. Prepared board papers, managed governance frameworks and maintained constructive working relationships with directors, auditors and regulators.

Led CBA Insurance through the Royal Commission, implementing conduct and compliance reforms across a $1 billion business. Uplifted risk management, strengthened operational governance and ran a disciplined remedial action plan. Signed the Executive Attestation to close ASIC's Pricing Promise Review with no regulatory action taken. Managed APRA, ASIC and AFCA relationships across multiple insurers.
Negotiated with insurers, technology vendors and reinsurers across Singapore, London and Bermuda. Managed relationships with partner banks (CBA, Westpac) and distribution networks.

Set strategic direction at five major financial institutions. Established the Hollard-CBA 15-year alliance for one million customers. Defined portfolio strategy, channel mix and competitive positioning.

Deployed agentic AI for underwriting with 97% accuracy at SCI. Integrated weather forecasting, predictive workforce planning, supplier allocation and digital claim services at CBA. Launched a packaged insurance product for high-net-worth individuals at Suncorp. Built governance frameworks for responsible AI use.

Led the Hollard-CBA portfolio transition for one million customers. Established the Westpac-Allianz distribution alliance. Managed Suncorp/Promina integration in personal lines. Earlier career in venture capital on early-stage capital raising.

Delivered first underwriting profit at Suncorp personal lines after five consecutive loss years. Reduced peril exposure at CBA through improved data sources, cost and capital allocation models and granular monitoring. Developed pricing models, managed catastrophe exposure and built risk appetite frameworks.
Quadrupled direct channel sales at SCI after three years of decline. Grew CBA digital sales from 20% to 70%. Built digital-first operating models for insurance distribution.
Full P&L accountability for a $1 billion premium business at CBA. Improved loss ratios, managed combined ratios and delivered to target returns across multiple portfolios.

Cleared a 30,000-task backlog at SCI, reduced underwriting cycle time by 19%. Shifted digital trading from under 5% to 60%. At CBA, managed record natural catastrophe seasons and additional compliance obligations with a flat headcount through digitisation and process engineering. Integrated claims operations to finalise event claims faster and at lower cost than industry averages. Grew CBA digital sales from 20% to 70%.

Led 700 staff through the Royal Commission, pandemic and divestment at CBA. Staff feedback consistently noted clarity of purpose, connection to customers and shared accountability for outcomes. Achieved 76% engagement at SCI. Rebuilt trust through the Hollard-CBA alliance and Suncorp/Promina integration.

Improved NPS at CBA from +15 to +45 and at Westpac from +25 to +44. Product recognised by CANSTAR for outstanding value five consecutive years. Developed a CBA rating factor that reduced premiums by 10% for customers while improving the loss ratio. Established customer systemic issue analysis to identify and prevent harm to customers.
Led teams of up to 700 people. Achieved 76% staff engagement at SCI. Built high-performing teams through clear strategy, capability development and cultural alignment across five institutions.

caseStudies.title: Digital transformation and AI deployment at scale
caseStudies.role: General Manager, Data and Technology Solutions
caseStudies.summary: Deployed digital channels, pricing sophistication and AI automation. Cleared a backlog of 30,000 tasks, reduced underwriting cycle time by 19% and achieved 76% staff engagement.
outcomes: Digital trading shifted from less than 5% to 60% of volume
Direct channel sales quadrupled after three years of decline
30,000-task backlog cleared
Underwriting cycle time reduced by 19%
AI deployed with 97% accuracy in underwriting triage
76% staff engagement score

caseStudies.title: Leading a $1 billion insurer through disruption
caseStudies.summary: Led a $1 billion insurer through the Royal Commission, pandemic and regulatory reform. Developed a rating factor that reduced premiums by 10% while improving the loss ratio by 1%. Grew digital sales from 20% to 70%.
outcomes: $1 billion premium managed across home, motor and landlord
700-person team led through Royal Commission, pandemic and divestment
CANSTAR outstanding value five consecutive years
Rating factor reduced premiums 10% while improving loss ratio 1%
NPS improved from +15 to +45
Digital sales grew by more than 20% annually for five years
Event claims finalised faster and at lower cost than industry averages
Motor portfolio decline reversed

caseStudies.title: Establishing a 15-year strategic alliance
caseStudies.summary: Established a 15-year strategic alliance with Commonwealth Bank for one million customers. Led the transition and portfolio transformation to meet target returns and risk appetite.
outcomes: 15-year strategic alliance established with CBA
Portfolio changes delivered within five months to meet target returns and risk appetite
ASIC Pricing Promise Review closed with no regulatory action
One million customers transitioned successfully

caseStudies.title: First underwriting profit after five consecutive loss years
caseStudies.summary: Delivered the first underwriting profit in personal lines after five consecutive loss years. Repriced the portfolio, improved claims management and rebuilt distributor relationships across the Promina network.
outcomes: First underwriting profit in personal lines after five consecutive loss years
Portfolio repriced through group pricing engine integration
Underwriting operations consolidated across the Promina network
High-net-worth packaged insurance product launched
Distributor relationships rebuilt across the Promina network

caseStudies.title: Doubling premiums and lifting NPS from +25 to +44
caseStudies.summary: Established distribution plan and operating model for the Westpac-Allianz alliance. Doubled written premiums and increased NPS from +25 to +44.
outcomes: Written premiums doubled through portfolio transfers and lending integration
NPS increased from +25 to +44
50-person product and operations team
Distribution plan and operating model established for the Westpac-Allianz alliance

philosophy: Pragmatic outcomes for users come first. Technology sits safely and securely in the background, powering the experience without being the experience. Build the strategy, teams and culture that deliver lasting performance. Evidence over adjectives.
